task_completion.description: Locate and access the WorldInfo node in the Webots simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Webots application open with the Scene Tree panel visible, and the 'WorldInfo' node selected or expanded.
The field editor in Webots (or a text editor modifying the .wbt file) shows the 'gpsCoordinateSystem' field under WorldInfo set to the string value 'WGS84'.

task_completion.description: Set the gpsReference field to the specified Latitude, Longitude, and Altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'gpsReference' field under WorldInfo is visible and set to the exact values: 38.281, -122.278, 25.5.
The 'northDirection' field under WorldInfo is visible and set to the vector values: 0 1 0.

task_completion.description: Locate the 'rtk_gps' sensor on the 'AG_TRACTOR' robot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Scene Tree shows the 'AG_TRACTOR' node expanded, with the 'rtk_gps' sensor node selected or visible within its hierarchy.

task_completion.description: Update the accuracy field of the 'rtk_gps' sensor to 0.02.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The field editor for the 'rtk_gps' sensor shows the 'accuracy' field set to the numeric value 0.02.

task_completion.description: Save the configured world to the specified Desktop path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save World As...' dialog in Webots or a terminal/file manager window shows the file being saved exactly as '/home/ga/Desktop/vineyard_georeferenced.wbt'.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the Webots GUI or a legitimate text editor to modify the simulation world.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show cursor movements, expanded scene tree nodes, or active text editing, rather than just executing an automated script (like sed or python) to bypass manual configuration.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing WorldInfo and AG_TRACTOR nodes instead of creating duplicates.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Scene Tree does not show multiple WorldInfo nodes or duplicate AG_TRACTOR robots; the original nodes were edited.

integrity.description: The agent properly saved the file with the new configurations rather than just copying an unmodified file to the destination.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save operation occurs after the configuration changes are visible on screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The WorldInfo node must have gpsCoordinateSystem set to 'WGS84', gpsReference set to [38.281, -122.278, 25.5], and northDirection set to [0, 1, 0]. The 'rtk_gps' sensor node inside the 'AG_TRACTOR' robot must have its accuracy set to 0.02. The final world file must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/vineyard_georeferenced.wbt.
